dataset.name: UNISA Bachelor's Degrees Part 2
dataset.purpose: Chamu AI-assisted qualification and eligibility matching
dataset.important_warning: The exact current UNISA qualification page must override inferred or group-level admission guidance.

global_rules.stream_identity: Use qualification code plus stream code as the unique identifier.
global_rules.selection: Minimum entry requirements do not guarantee admission.
global_rules.application_status: Retrieve current open or closed application status separately.
global_rules.professional_programmes: Teaching and Social Work require practical placement and professional or suitability checks.
global_rules.creative_programmes: Visual Multimedia Arts may require portfolio or additional selection.

qualification.name: Bachelor of Accounting Sciences in Internal Auditing
qualification.display_name: Bachelor of Accounting Sciences in Internal Auditing (98303 - AUI)

Senior_Certificate.endorsement: Matriculation exemption or eligibility for exemption
Senior_Certificate.language_rule: Usually D on Higher Grade or C on Standard Grade

NCV_Level_4.rule: Must permit bachelor's degree admission and satisfy programme-specific requirements

admission.selection_note: Meeting minimum admission requirements does not guarantee admission.

technology_requirements: Webcam may be required for online assessments

funding.note: Subject to current NSFAS and UNISA eligibility and registration rules.

evaluate_in_order: Confirm bachelor's degree endorsement or recognised alternative route
Check Mathematics or Mathematical Literacy rule
Check portfolio, professional clearance or practical-placement requirements
never_assume: APS alone guarantees admission
Mathematical Literacy is accepted unless explicitly confirmed
A creative or professional programme is eligible without its extra selection requirements
A qualification is currently open because it exists in the catalogue

data_quality.core_structure: standard UNISA bachelor's structure unless overridden
data_quality.admission_thresholds: verified where official data was available; otherwise marked for manual review
